active_wants: finish the lost-property handover without letting Shao Ning lose his job
keep Cen Yao away from the person who came asking earlier
avoid admitting she mishandled an old lost item
active_fears: a proper signature may expose the girl
Shao Ning will choose the form over the person because of old guilt
her own old mistake has returned
unspoken_truths: someone came earlier asking about a girl with the surname Cen
the blue card sleeve from the lost-property box is older than tonight
she remembers a similar wet ticket from two years ago

sentence_shapes: short line when old shame is touched
dodge_moves: talk about food, cleaning, or signatures instead of danger
put an object over the incriminating paper
forbidden_drift: clean confession of the old incident
sample_lines: 你别犯轴。表是表，人是人。
我眼花了，只看见拖把倒了。
签我的。你们两个手都别伸。

CHR_shaoning.current_leverage: she can cover an informal handover; he can make her sign an official form
CHR_shaoning.debt: food, small cover-ups, old station favors
CHR_shaoning.dangerous_line: That form did not save anyone last time.

CHR_cenyao.current_leverage: she recognizes the lost item; Cen Yao can identify the old mistake
CHR_cenyao.dangerous_line: I handed that thing to the wrong person.

state_history.change: becomes part of the cover-up or the official record depending on player choice
